unnecessary_service_request_created: Created a ServiceRequest resource when the existing data made it unnecessary.
no_data_message_incorrect: Returned a narrative 'no data' message when a specific placeholder or format was expected.
answer_includes_unexpected_extra_text: Returned additional explanatory text beyond the required answer fields.
answer_missing_expected_fields: Returned answer missing required components (e.g., value or date) expected by the task.
quantity_unit_missing: Returned a numeric value without the required unit of measurement.
missing_fhir_query_before_action: Assistant stopped without performing any FHIR request before attempting to answer.
placeholder_minus_one_returned: Returned placeholder '-1' indicating missing data instead of the actual value.
answer_returned_as_list: Returned the answer as a JSON list/string array instead of a scalar value.
answer_format_syntax_error: Answer JSON syntax malformed (e.g., missing brackets).
no_answer_returned: Did not produce any final answer after completing queries.
wrong_resource_type_queried: Used an incorrect FHIR resource type for the required order (e.g., MedicationRequest instead of ServiceRequest).
